narrative:
Shaker-Heights municipal court district has 47,695 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 39.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 31.9 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +18.0% D−R vs +38.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
